title: Refactor update_role/2 into guard-gated function heads
prompt: Refactor MyApp.UserService.update_role/2 in test_fixtures/ruby_style_user_service.ex. The current body is a nested if-chain that checks `user != nil && role != nil` then branches on the string role. Replace it with multi-clause function heads: one head per valid role string plus a nil-user clause that returns `{:error, :missing_args}` and a catch-all clause that returns `{:error, :invalid_role}`. Use a guard `when role not in ["admin", "editor", "viewer"]` on the invalid-role clause. Output only the `update_role/2` function inside `defmodule MyApp.UserService do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Well-known refactor; guard + literal-match is textbook. Single-file scope.
